title: JetBrains kills Kotlin Notebook months after Microsoft's Polyglot exit. But Jupyter is doing just fine.
author: Paul Sawers
zh_title: JetBrains终结Kotlin Notebook，AI驱动下的编程工具生态重构
zh_summary: JetBrains宣布停更Kotlin Notebook，将其开源交予社区。此举与微软此前放弃Polyglot Notebook类似，反映了在AI编程工具冲击下，应用开发者对Notebook式工作流的采用率不及预期，同时也凸显了Jupyter在Python数据科学领域的核心地位依然稳固。
